headline: What to Know About the Air Force Refueling Tanker That Crashed in Iraq
summary: The U.S. Air Force tanker involved in the crash was a decades-old KC-135 Stratotanker built by Boeing and powered by engines from CFM International.

headline: Meta AI model delays, GDP growth slows, Boeing 737 Max jet delays
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Friday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Fourth quarter gross domestic product (GDP) growth slowed more than economists expected. Boeing (BA) is in focus after Bloomberg reported that the company is repairing several 737 Max jets. Meta (META) has reportedly delayed the launch of its artificial intelligence (AI) model "Avocado," according to the New York Times. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.
